title: Nutanix alert is open in Prism Central
description: Notifies when a Nutanix alert is open (unacknowledged and unresolved) in Prism Central, with one monitor case per alert via @aggregation_key. The monitor auto-recovers when the alert is acknowledged or resolved in Prism Central. Lifecycle events (created, acknowledged, reopened, resolved) appear in the Events Explorer under the same aggregation key.

definition.name: {{#is_alert}}OPEN{{/is_alert}}{{#is_recovery}}RESOLVED{{/is_recovery}} [Nutanix {{ntnx_alert_severity.name}}]   [{{ntnx_alert_impact.name}}] [{{ntnx_originating_cluster_name.name}}] - {{ext_id.name}}
